site.title: Elesun — Power the World, Green the Future
site.tagline: Power the World · Green the Future

hero.subtitle: Since 2005, driving the future with smart electric mobility. Elesun delivers innovative, sustainable transportation solutions for a cleaner planet.

mission.label: Our Purpose
mission.title:
DRIVE THE FUTURE
GUARD THE EARTH
mission.desc: For 20 years, Elesun has been at the forefront of electric mobility, combining cutting-edge technology with responsible manufacturing.

cards.title: GLOBAL REACH
cards.desc: Smart electric drive benefits the world. Our solutions serve customers across Indonesia and beyond.

cards.title: CLEAN POWER
cards.desc: Clean power guards our planet. Every Elesun vehicle contributes to a sustainable future.

cards.title: 20 YEARS
cards.desc: Two decades of innovation in electric two-wheelers. Experience you can trust.

vehicles.label: Our Fleet
vehicles.title: ELECTRIC VEHICLES
vehicles.desc: Four series for every journey — from agile speed to heavy-duty utility.

values.label: What We Stand For
values.title: OUR VALUES
values.desc: Eight principles that guide every decision we make, every vehicle we build.

contact.title: READY TO GO ELECTRIC?
contact.desc: Connect with us on WhatsApp for pricing, availability, and partnership opportunities.

footer.brandDesc: Power the world, green the future. Elesun has been driving electric mobility innovation since 2005.
